personas.name: Frequent Fitness Logger
personas.description: A user who depends on the app for regular workout tracking and expects logging to work reliably during or immediately after exercise.
pain_points: The app crashes while saving workouts
Previously entered activity data may disappear
context: Using the app during exercise sessions
Using the app outdoors or while moving
constraints: Workout logging must complete without crashing
personas.notes: Refined the persona description and removed an unsupported assumption about synchronization.
